note: Sprint 5a Phase 3.1 closure ships 13/14 fields as production bindings; 'ui' (Pi ExtensionUIContext) is deferred to ADR-0033 (Phase 5 TUI). All 14 names are required to be present on Aelix's ExtensionContext class — the deferred field can be a property that returns None or raises, but it must EXIST so factory code referencing it does not AttributeError.
